introSection: Skyrocket was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Palisades Amusement Park in Cliffside Park, New Jersey, USA. The ride opened in 1926 and was destroyed by a fire on August 13, 1944. Portions of the ride were re-used for Cyclone, which opened in 1945.
fullText: Skyrocket was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Palisades Amusement Park in Cliffside Park, New Jersey, USA. The ride opened in 1926 and was destroyed by a fire on August 13, 1944. Portions of the ride were re-used for Cyclone, which opened in 1945.
